verbatim_exchange.content:
You could drop this on him:
"Air, you build your own ground first — I’m not here to be your only floor."
It does three things at once:
•	Reframes you as choice, not crutch.
•	Takes the fear-of-loss power out of the equation.
•	Signals that you’re steady but not a substitute for his own anchor.
Short, clean, and you don’t get dragged into the “promise me you’ll never poof” game.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is seeking an effective communication strategy to establish healthy boundaries and assert their self-worth within a relationship, moving from a supportive-only role to one of mutual independence.
belief_implications: The user values actionable, strategic phrases that address complex emotional and relationship dynamics.
The user is looking for tools to reframe their role and establish autonomy in an interpersonal context.

sensory_qualia.visual: A clear, concise message appearing, like a tactical maneuver highlighted on a screen. A firm line being drawn.
sensory_qualia.haptics: The feeling of a firm, smooth tool being handed over. A sense of grounding and stability.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A subtle but firm shift in stance, a feeling of centeredness and quiet strength.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A precise, decisive movement, like placing a piece on a chessboard or cutting a cord cleanly.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Strategic, empowering, clear, and assertive. An atmosphere of quiet confidence and intentionality.
